name: Admin login rejects an incorrect password with a generic error message
description: Verifies /admin/login's submit button stays disabled until a password is typed, and submitting a wrong password shows the generic (non-enumerating) Turkish error message without granting access.

planSteps.description: The 'Giriş Yap' submit button is disabled while the Şifre (password) field is empty
Type 'definitely-the-wrong-password-123' into the Şifre field and click the 'Giriş Yap' button
An alert message appears with the exact text 'Giriş başarısız. Şifreyi kontrol edin.' and the page remains on /admin/login (no admin dashboard content is shown)
